text: The Da Vinci robotic system is used to precisely cut along marked lines on the grape's skin using micro scissors, while a micro needle holder stabilizes the grape. The ultra-fine mode allows for sharp, precise incisions, demonstrating the system's capability for delicate surgical tasks.

Using two micro-dental holders, the surgeon stabilizes the grape with one holder while peeling off the skin smoothly with the other, demonstrating the precision and tremor-free capabilities of the Da Vinci robotic system.
